api_key.description: Svix API key, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Svix API base URL. Svix is multi-region (us/eu/ca/au/in); override with the region-specific host (e.g. https://api.eu.svix.com/api/v1) if the account is not on the default/US region, or for tests/proxies.
